title: Arrays, Collections, Iterables, and Generators · Mastery Check
summary: Transform ordered requests, unique identifiers, lookup tables, and streaming batches while preserving ownership and order. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a collection-processing and streaming pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose mutating or copying array operations and document ownership before updating shared data.
Use map, filter, reduce, find, some, every, flat, and flatMap from the required output and early-exit behavior.
Sort with a valid comparator, copying policy, stability expectations, and locale-aware text rules.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.javascript:
// javascript-basics cumulative stakeholder program.
// Add one runnable behavior, assertion, changed case, and evidence return per activity.
